title: Beta Sabers
description: Mod that Contains lightsabers, and sabers with different purpose. the mod is still being worked on. future updates will contain QOL features!
body:
**Mod Content**

  This mod adds unique swords and sabers!. over 27 New swords that have their own   abilities!.

  **Dark Rod & White rod**
  
  Dark rod is used to make the handle of the sabers. to acquire one you have to smith
  " Blaze Rod + Netherite + Upgrade smithing template". The White rod is mainly used   for Holy saber and 5 Lightsaber styles. For the white rod you need to smith with   these items " Breeze Rod + Quartz + Upgrade smithing template ".

  **Crystals**
  
  Crystals vary upon the sabers. to acquire those you have to craft empty crystal     shell that you will have to use to make unique crystals.

  **LightSabers**

  LightSabers are the easiest to acquire and there are 5 different colors with 2   styles. You can craft one with "White/Dark rod + Lightsaber Crystals  (any) + Amethyst shard".
  
  **Sabers and Extra**

  Sabers are unique each on their own. Containing their own Effects on both the user and on the enemy on impact. they are crafted with the same lightsaber format. except they are definently better than lightsabers themselves.
